passive.name: A Harmless Scarecrow
passive.description: Fiddlesticks' trinket is replaced by scarecrow effigies.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{ci|Fiddlesticks}} has a {{ii|Scarecrow Effigy}} in place of a trinket, which will imitate '''Fiddlesticks'''. '''Fiddlesticks''' can impersonate an effigy by remaining idle [[Combat status|out of combat]].
wiki_detail.blurb2: After level 6, placing an effigy will {{tip|true sight|reveal}} the area for a few seconds.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate - Scarecrow Effigy:}} '''Fiddlesticks''' begins the game with an exclusive {{ii|Scarecrow Effigy}}, which permanently occupies the [[Trinket item|trinket]] slot. '''Fiddlesticks''' can pretend to be an {{tip|Effigy}} by standing still and not acting nor being acted upon for 2 seconds, during which it adjusts its body into a scarecrow and extends its arm out to expose its lantern.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Innate - A Harmless Scarecrow:}} From [[Experience (champion)|level]] 6 onward, placing an {{tip|Effigy}} also summons a {{tip|Sweeper Drone}} at the location for 6 seconds.
wiki_detail.notes:
* {{ii|Scarecrow Effigy|Scarecrow Effigies}} are unavailable on [[ARAM]] until '''Fiddlesticks''' uses or sells its {{ii|Poro-Snax}}.
* The process of or the act of pretending to be an {{tip|Effigy}} will be interrupted if '''Fiddlesticks''':
** Moves.
** Takes damage.
** Declares an attack.
** Casts any ability or spell.
** Starts {{tip|channel|channeling}}.
** Is hit by an ability.
** Is affected by a {{tip|crowd control}} effect.
** Uses item (not [[Trinket item|trinket]]).
* ''Effigies'' will mimic '''Fiddlesticks' ''' idle animations and their [[health bar]]s are hidden until they fake an action.
** If '''Fiddlesticks''' pretends to be an {{tip|Effigy}}, its health bar stays hidden until the pose is interrupted.
* Effigies are considered {{tip|clone|clones}}.
** They are not valid targets to [[direction-targeted|direction]], [[ground-targeted|ground]], and [[auto-targeted]] effects for first {{tt|{{fd|1.5}} seconds|Estimated}} of their lifespan.
* The trinket slot can still be temporarily replaced by {{ii|Eye of the Herald}}.
* [[File:A Harmless Scarecrow Surprise Party.png|30px|border]] - {{csl|Fiddlesticks|Surprise Party}} has a special icon for this ability.
* While pretending to be an {{tip|Effigy}} '''Fiddlesticks''' gets ''Harmless Scarecrow'' buff in row of buffs.
* Recharge time and duration of trincket described on separate page: {{ii|Scarecrow Effigy}}

Q.name: Terrify
Q.description: Fiddlesticks damaging enemies with spells while unseen or targeting an enemy with Terrify's activation strikes a target unit with fear, causing it to flee in terror for a duration.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive:}} While {{ci|Fiddlesticks}} is unseen or impersonating an {{ai|A Harmless Scarecrow|Fiddlesticks|effigy}}, its next damaging ability will briefly {{tip|fear}} targets hit.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Fiddlesticks}} screeches at the target enemy, {{tip|fear|fearing}} them and dealing {{as|magic damage}} based on the {{as|target's '''current''' health}}.
wiki_detail.blurb3: If the target has recently been feared by '''Fiddlesticks''', ''Terrify'' will instead deal {{ccs|double damage|magic}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Passive:}} While '''Fiddlesticks''' has been [[combat status|out of combat]] for at least {{tt|{{fd|2.5}} seconds|Estimated}} and is not {{tip|sight|visible}} to the enemy team, or is pretending to be an {{tip|Effigy}}, its next damaging ability will additionally {{tip|fear}} targets hit for a duration.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Fiddlesticks''' launches a crow at the target enemy that deals {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|fear|fears}} them for a duration. ''Terrify'' has a minimum damage threshold and is capped at 400 against {{tip|monsters}}.
wiki_detail.description3: Targets feared by '''Fiddlesticks''' by any means cannot be affected by it again for a duration equal to ''Terrify's'' cooldown. Against these targets, ''Terrify's'' {{ccs|damage|magic}} and minimum threshold are doubled.
wiki_detail.leveling3:
{{st|Increased Magic Damage|{{as|{{ap|6*2 to 10*2}}% {{as|(+ 4% per 100 AP)}} of target's '''current''' health}}}}
{{st|Increased Minimum Damage|{{ap|40*2 to 120*2}}}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* The fear-immunity timer is not refreshed by subsequent attempts to fear the target.
* The {{tip|fear}} is applied {{tt|at the end of the cast time|0.363 seconds after the start of cast, due game tick rate}}, regardless of the target's distance or the missile landing.
** The missile cannot be destroyed except by {{tip|projectile|projectile-interception}} effects.
* '''Fiddlesticks''' is considered "seen" if it is visible and is inside an enemy champion's {{tt|sight radius|1350 units}}. Vision from {{tip|minion|minions}}, {{tip|ward|wards}}, and {{tip|turret|turrets}} will not prevent '''Fiddlesticks''' from {{tip|flee|fearing}} if there are no nearby enemy champions.
** There is a very brief grace period after being seen or when entering combat. This can allow for multiple spells to inflict {{tip|fear}}.
* {{tip|Monster|Monsters}} are feared by '''Fiddlesticks's''' abilities when '''Fiddlesticks''' is out of combat, with some exceptions.
** If '''Fiddlesticks''' has recently damaged a monster from a camp with a basic attack or abilities (including {{si|Smite}} but not item active abilities), monsters in that camp will not be feared by his other abilities.
** {{ai|Bountiful Harvest|Fiddlesticks}} will not fear monsters unless '''Fiddlesticks''' is pretending to be an {{tip|Effigy}} or is not visible to them.
* {{tip|minion|Minions}} are always feared if '''Fiddlesticks''' is not attacking them and there is no enemy champion in its view.
* The passive portion does not currently communicate any information to '''Fiddlesticks''', its allies nor its enemies. There is no indicator to say that '''Fiddlesticks''' is out of combat; and no indicator or debuff icon on affected enemies.
** A visual indicator will circle around all enemy champions while '''Fiddlesticks''' is channeling {{ai|Crowstorm|Fiddlesticks}} if it is unseen. This is only visible to '''Fiddlesticks'''.
* The fear immunity applies even if the target is {{tip|cc-immune|crowd control immune}}. It is not applied if it is blocked by {{tip|spell shield}}.
* ''Terrify'' will still cast and affect the target even if '''Fiddlesticks''' dies or loses {{tip|sight}} of them during the cast time.
** ''Terrify'' will still cast but not affect the target if they die or become {{tip|untargetable}} during the cast time. There is no compensation.
* The [[summoner|player's]] screen will have a visual effect when successfully {{tip|flee|feared}} by ''Terrify''.
* [[File:Terrify Surprise Party.png|30px|border]] - {{csl|Fiddlesticks|Surprise Party}} has a special icon for this ability.
* {{ai|Crowstorm|Fiddlesticks}} will not fear enemy champions if cast while they have vision of '''Fiddlesticks''', even if '''Fiddlesticks''' is pretending to be an {{tip|Effigy}}.
wiki_detail.tips: * {{tip|Nearsight}} reduces an enemy {{tip|champion|champion's}} {{tip|sight}} radius, thus allowing '''Fiddlesticks''' to utilize the passive portion of ''Terrify'' more effectively.

W.name: Bountiful Harvest
W.description: Fiddlesticks drains health from nearby enemies, dealing bonus execute damage at the end of the duration.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Fiddlesticks}} {{tip|tethers}} to nearby enemies, continually dealing {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|heal|healing}} for a portion of damage dealt.
wiki_detail.blurb2: If Fiddlesticks ends the channel without interruption, the last tick deals increased {{as|magic damage}} and the remaining cooldown is {{sti|ah|reduced}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Fiddlesticks''' forms a {{tip|tether}} between itself and each nearby enemy over the cast time, then {{tip|channel|channels}} for up to 2 seconds to harvest their souls, {{tip|true sight|revealing}} them in the process.
wiki_detail.description2: While '''Fiddlesticks''' is channeling, the tethered enemies are dealt {{as|magic damage}} every {{fd|0.25}} seconds, with the final tick at the end of the channel dealing an additional {{as|12% missing health magic damage}}. ''Bountiful Harvest'' deals {{#var:monster_damage}}% damage against {{tip|monster|monsters}} and {{#var:minion_damage}}% damage against {{tip|minions|minions}}.
wiki_detail.leveling2: {{st|Magic Damage per Tick|{{ap|{{#var:min_base_damage}}*0.125 to {{#var:max_base_damage}}*0.125}} {{as|(+ {{fd|{{#expr:{{#var:ap_ratio}}/8}}}}% AP)}}|Last Tick of Damage|{{ap|{{#var:min_base_damage}}*0.125 to {{#var:max_base_damage}}*0.125}} {{as|(+ {{fd|{{#expr:{{#var:ap_ratio}}/8}}}}% AP)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|{{#var:min_execute_damage}} to {{#var:max_execute_damage}}}}% of target's '''missing''' health)}}|Total Magic Damage|{{ap|{{#var:min_base_damage}} to {{#var:max_base_damage}}}} {{as|(+ {{#var:ap_ratio}}% AP)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|{{#var:min_execute_damage}} to {{#var:max_execute_damage}}}}% of target's '''missing''' health)}}}}
wiki_detail.description3: '''Fiddlesticks''' {{tip|heals}} itself for a percentage of the {{tt|pre-mitigation damage|Damage dealt before modifiers}} dealt, modified to {{#var:monster_heal}}% against monsters and {{#var:minion_heal}}% against minions.
wiki_detail.leveling3: {{st|Champion Heal Percentage|{{ap|{{#var:min_champ_heal}} to {{#var:max_champ_heal}}}}%|Total Heal per Champion|{{ap|({{#var:min_base_damage}} to {{#var:max_base_damage}})*({{#var:min_champ_heal}} to {{#var:max_champ_heal}})/100}} {{as|(+ {{ap|{{#var:ap_ratio}}/100*({{#var:min_champ_heal}} to {{#var:max_champ_heal}})}}% AP)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|({{#var:min_execute_damage}} to {{#var:max_execute_damage}})*({{#var:min_champ_heal}} to {{#var:max_champ_heal}})/100}}% of target's '''missing''' health)}}|Total Heal per Monster|{{ap|{{#var:min_base_damage}}*{{#var:monster_damage}}/100*{{#var:monster_heal}}/100 to {{#var:max_base_damage}}*{{#var:monster_damage}}/100*{{#var:monster_heal}}/100}} {{as|(+ {{ap|{{#var:ap_ratio}}*{{#var:monster_damage}}/100*{{#var:monster_heal}}/100}}% AP)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|{{#var:min_execute_damage}}*{{#var:monster_damage}}/100*{{#var:monster_heal}}/100 to {{#var:max_execute_damage}}*{{#var:monster_damage}}/100*{{#var:monster_heal}}/100}}% of target's '''missing''' health)}}|Total Heal per Minion|{{ap|{{#var:min_base_damage}}*{{#var:minion_damage}}/100*{{#var:minion_heal}}/100 to {{#var:max_base_damage}}*{{#var:minion_damage}}/100*{{#var:minion_heal}}/100}} {{as|(+ {{ap|{{#var:ap_ratio}}*{{#var:minion_damage}}/100*{{#var:minion_heal}}/100}}% AP)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|{{#var:min_execute_damage}}*{{#var:minion_damage}}/100*{{#var:minion_heal}}/100 to {{#var:max_execute_damage}}*{{#var:minion_damage}}/100*{{#var:minion_heal}}/100}}% of target's '''missing''' health)}}}}
wiki_detail.description4: ''Bountiful Harvest'' ends if all targets have died or broken their tethers. If the channel was not {{tt|interrupted|e.g. by Fiddlesticks or crowd control effects}}, 60% of the {{sti|'''current''' cooldown}} is refunded.
wiki_detail.description5: ''A nearby enemy is required to cast this ability. The target does not have to be {{tip|sight|visible}} to be tethered by this ability.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* {{tip|Spell shield}} will block the tether's application but not the damage of one already applied.
* [[File:Bountiful Harvest Surprise Party.png|30px|border]] - {{csl|Fiddlesticks|Surprise Party}} has a special icon for this ability.
* The following table refers for interactions while '''Fiddlesticks''' is {{tip|channel|channeling}}:
{{ct|channel|attack=interrupts|cast=interrupts|move=interrupts|items=interrupts,true,,false|spells=true, interrupts, interrupts, interrupts, interrupts, interrupts, interrupts}}

E.name: Reap
E.description: Fiddlesticks slashes an area with its scythe, slowing all enemies hit and silencing enemies hit in the center of the slash.
E.tooltip: Fiddlesticks unleashes dark magic, dealing {{ damage }} magic damage and Slowing by {{ slowamount*-100 }}% for {{ silenceduration }} seconds. Enemies in the center are also Silenced for the duration.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Fiddlesticks}} slashes the target area, dealing {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|slow|slowing}} enemies hit.
wiki_detail.blurb2: Enemies hit in the center of the slash are also {{tip|silence|silenced}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Fiddlesticks''' slashes the target location with its scythe, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies within the area and {{tip|slow|slowing}} them for {{fd|1.25}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: Enemies hit in the center of the area are also {{tip|silence|silenced}} for {{fd|1.25}} seconds.
wiki_detail.notes: * [[File:Reap Surprise Party.png|30px|border]] - {{csl|Fiddlesticks|Surprise Party}} has a special icon for this ability.

R.name: Crowstorm
R.description: A murder of crows flock wildly around Fiddlesticks, dealing damage per second to all enemy units in the area.
R.tooltip: Fiddlesticks channels for {{ channeltime }} seconds, then teleports and unleashes a murder of crows, dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage over {{ duration }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Fiddlesticks}} {{tip|channels}}, then {{tip|blinks}} to the target location surrounded by a murder of crows, continually dealing {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Fiddlesticks''' {{tip|channel|channels}} for {{fd|1.5}} seconds, then {{tip|blink|blinks}} to the target location upon completion with a murder of crows flying wildly around it for 5 seconds, dealing {{as|magic damage}} every {{fd|0.25}} seconds to nearby enemies.
wiki_detail.leveling: {{st|Magic Damage per Tick|{{ap|150*0.25 to 350*0.25}} {{as|(+ {{fd|12.5}}% AP)}}|Total Magic Damage|{{ap|150*5 to 350*5}} {{as|(+ 250% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: ''Crowstorm will cast at max range if cast beyond that.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* {{tip|Root|Roots}} do not {{tip|interrupt}} the ability despite being a [[Channel#Movement Channels|movement channel]].
* '''Fiddlesticks''' will always {{tip|blink}} to its intended location even if its position changes during the {{tip|channel}} without being interrupted (e.g. by {{ai|Realm Warp|Ryze}}).
* [[File:Crowstorm Surprise Party.png|30px|border]] - {{csl|Fiddlesticks|Surprise Party}} has a special icon for this ability.
* The following table refers for interactions while '''Fiddlesticks''' is {{tip|channel|channeling}}:
{{ct|channel|attack=false|cast=false|move=false|items=false, true|spells=true, false, false, false, false|interrupts=death, silence, ground}}
